vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup shadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/shadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/shadow-

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes file permissions on a backup copy of /etc/shadow. It does not affect the active authentication database, so the risk of lockout or service disruption is negligible.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Potential impact on backup processes that may need to read the file; Incorrect chmod syntax could leave the file overly permissive
